mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT b.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, COUNT(*) AS partCount, SUM(b.need_qty) AS totalNeedQty, MAX(b.reg_emp_no) AS regEmpNo, MAX(b.reg_date) AS regDate FROM bom b JOIN product p ON b.product_code = p.product_code GROUP BY b.product_code, p.product_name ORDER BY b.product_code ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT b.product_code AS productCode, finished.product_name AS productName, b.product_won AS productWon, part.product_name AS productWonName, b.need_qty AS needQty, b.reg_emp_no AS regEmpNo, b.reg_date AS regDate FROM bom b JOIN product finished ON b.product_code = finished.product_code JOIN product part ON b.product_won = part.product_code WHERE b.product_code = #{value} ORDER BY b.product_won
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bom ( product_code, product_won, need_qty, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{productWon}, #{needQty}, #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName FROM product p WHERE p.product_status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bom b WHERE b.product_code = p.product_code ) ORDER BY p.product_code
SELECT p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName FROM product p WHERE p.product_status = 1 AND p.product_code = #{value}
SELECT product_code AS productWon, product_name AS productWonName FROM product WHERE product_status = 0 ORDER BY product_code

SELECT product_code AS productCode, product_won AS productWon, need_qty AS needQty, reg_emp_no AS regEmpNo, reg_date AS regDate FROM bom WHERE product_code = #{productCode} AND product_won = #{productWon}
SELECT product_code AS productWon, product_name AS productWonName FROM product WHERE product_status = 0 ORDER BY product_code
